intro.text: The city grid is chained to obsolete refineries. ARES keeps rerouting us back to fossil peaks.

options.text: I can shut down the worst emitters.
What is the fastest renewable upgrade path?

shutdown_plan.text: Target sentinel-guarded stacks and install scrubber relays. Once three plants are down, emissions fall fast.

options.text: I will break their control loop.

renewable_plan.text: Wind and geothermal can cover baseline demand. It costs more upfront but restores climate stability over time.

options.text: I will drive a full transition pilot.

end.text: Every clean megawatt is one less excuse for ARES to keep poisoning this skyline.
